title: trichantha oblongifolia
intro: Trichantha oblongifolia, also known as the Red Borneo or Borneo Red, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trichantha oblongifolia are said to include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from pain and inflammation, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Herbal preparations of Trichantha oblongifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used in traditional medicine in Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia and Malaysia.
